name: awp-pixel-plugin-and-mcp-codex
description: AWP pixel-art sprite and MCP workflows for Codex, inspired by willibrandon/pixel-plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, normalize, and track AWP pixel-art sprite assets.
interface.longDescription: AWP Pixel Plugin and MCP Codex adds Codex workflows for AWP-style 2.5D pixel sprites: one prompt per sprite, black-background 64x64 normalization, manifest updates, project asset integration, and local MCP tools.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me generate AWP pixel sprites and wire them into Codex.
